# Repo symbol map — autogenerated by scripts/repomap.py (drift-guarded by tests/test_repomap.py).
# Regenerate after editing code:  python scripts/repomap.py
#
# Jump to a symbol:  rg '\bNAME\b' .claude/repomap.md  ->  path:line  ->  Read(path, offset=line)
# List one file:     rg 'relpath/file.py' .claude/repomap.md
# Lines are  path:line: <signature>  so a single rg hit is a ready jump target.
